title: yci commercial evidence bundle
description: Required-field schema for evidence bundles produced under the commercial compliance regime. Version 1.

change_id.description: Unique ID for this change event (ticket reference, UUID, or opaque token).

change_summary.description: One-paragraph human summary of what changed and why.

pre_check_artifacts.description: Paths or URIs to artifacts captured before the change (state dumps, screenshots, test output).

post_check_artifacts.description: Paths or URIs to artifacts captured after the change (same shape as pre_check_artifacts).

rollback_plan.description: Human-readable rollback steps or a reference to a rehearsed runbook.

approver.description: Identity of the human who approved this change (email, handle, or ticket approver).

timestamp_utc.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp the change landed.

profile_commit.description: Git commit hash of the customer profile snapshot used for this change.
